PLEASE READ THESE TERMS & CONDITIONS CAREFULLY

1. Introduction

Welcome to The Window Shop’s website. By using the website, you agree to act in accordance with the TERMS & CONDITIONS. If you do not agree to the following TERMS & CONDITIONS, please discontinue using the website.

2. Purpose and Usage of the Website

The sole purpose of this website is to showcase our products, projects, and services. The content provided is for promotional and informational use. Inquiries regarding the products and services are permitted and can be done via the contact form or contact details provided on the website. Nevertheless, nothing on this site should be interpreted as a binding offer or agreement unless explicitly stated.

The user agrees to use the website for lawful purposes only as well as in a manner not to infringe the right of others or limit the enjoyment with the usage of the website. The following actions are prohibited:

  • Engage in illegal activities.

  • Distribute harmful or unlawful content.

  • Harass or defame other users.

3. Intellectual Property

All content presented on the site is the property of The Window Shop including, but not limited to software, text, images, videos, logos, graphics, and more. Moreover, all content is protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws. 

You are NOT permitted to use, reproduce, or distribute any content shown on this site without any written permission from us.

4. Privacy and Data Collection

By using our website, you consent to the collation and use of your personal data in agreement with our Privacy Policy. This may include the details submitted through our inquiry forms such as your name, email, and phone number. To know more about our Privacy Policy, please refer to the page of our Full Privacy Policy.

5. Product and Service Inquiry

Albeit we welcome inquiries regarding our products and services, it is important to know that it does NOT guarantee a business relationship by contacting us via the website or the inquiry made through the submission of forms. If a request is made through the inquiry forms, the user is granting us permission to contact via the provided information and details.

6. Third-Party Links

Our website may contain third-party links to websites (i.e. Facebook and Instagram) for convenience. Accessing these external websites are at your own risk.

7. Governing Law

These TERMS & CONDITIONS are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of the Philippines without regard to its conflict of law principles.

8. Termination of Access

Termination or suspension of access to the site is possible to any user as we reserve the right to initiate such action, without notice, for any reason that includes the following:

  • Violation of the TERMS & CONDITIONS
  • Inappropriate behaviour

9. Modification

We reserve the right to update or make changes with these TERMS & CONDITIONS on this website at any time. All changes made will be posted and the date of the revision will be indicated at the bottom of the page. Continuous usage of this website after any modifications made, you agree to comply with the updated TERMS & CONDITIONS.

10. Limitation of Liability

We are not liable for any damages—whether direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential—that may result from your use of this Site or from submitting product inquiries. This includes, but is not limited to, loss of data, business, or reputation.

LAST UPDATED : 14 August 2025
